use axum::{routing::post, Json, Router};
use serde::Deserialize;

async fn process_handler(Json(payload): Json<ProcessRequest>) -> String {
    let result = heavy_computation(&payload.data).await;
    format!("processed: {result}")
}

async fn sync_handler(Json(payload): Json<ProcessRequest>) -> String {
    tokio::task::spawn_blocking(move || {
        std::fs::write("/tmp/output.txt", &payload.data).unwrap();
    })
    .await
    .unwrap();
    "done".to_string()
}

fn build_router() -> Router {
    Router::new()
        .route("/process", post(process_handler))
        .route("/sync", post(sync_handler))
}

async fn heavy_computation(_data: &str) -> String { todo!() }

#[derive(Deserialize)]
struct ProcessRequest {
    data: String,
}
